channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Iran War Updates: 3 U.S. troops killed, dozens wounded as repeat attacks on base in Jordan raise questions - CBS News

item.title: Trump says Iran ‘will pay’ for killing soldiers ‘many times over’ after Pezeshkian says country fighting ‘full-scale war’ – Middle East crisis live - The Guardian
item.description:
1. Trump says Iran ‘will pay’ for killing soldiers ‘many times over’ after Pezeshkian says country fighting ‘full-scale war’ – Middle East crisis live  The Guardian
  2. Iran says it’s in ‘full-scale war’ with US as mediators said to proffer 10-day truce  The Times of Israel
  3. Iran-US war latest: Tehran tells Trump ‘our missiles will rain down on you for years’ in new threat  The Independent
  4. Iran president says country in ‘full-scale war’ with US  Arab News
  5. Pezeshkian Calls for National Unity, Justice to Navigate Wartime Challenges  تسنیم
